'''Jayden Myers''' (born 13 April 2003) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|wg}}er and {{rlp|ce}} for [[Wakefield Trinity]] in the [[Betfred Super League]].

He has previously played for the [[Bradford Bulls]] in the [[RFL Championship]] and spent time on loan from [[Bradford Bulls|Bradford]] at [[Cornwall R.L.F.C.|Cornwall]] in [[2022 RFL League 1|League 1]]. He has also spent time on loan from [[Wakefield Trinity|Wakefield]] at the [[Batley Bulldogs]] in the [[Betfred Championship]].

==Background==
Myers came through the [[Bradford Bulls]] Scholarship system and into the academy.<ref>[https://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/sport/sportlatest/23641640.bradford-bulls-keep-jayden-myers-odsal-end-2025/ Bradford Bulls keep Jayden Myers at Odsal until end of 2025]</ref><ref>[https://bradfordbulls.co.uk/news/bulls-confirm-myers-departure/ Bulls Confirm Myers Departure]</ref>

==Career==
In April 2022 Myers made his debut for [[Cornwall R.L.F.C.|Cornwall]], playing five games in [[2022 RFL League 1|League 1]] on loan from [[Bradford Bulls|Bradford]].<ref>[https://bradfordbulls.co.uk/news/myers-signs-new-two-year-deal/ Myers Signs New Two Year Deal!]</ref>

He made his debut for the [[Bradford Bulls|Bulls]] in a [[Challenge Cup]] victory over [[York Acorn]] in March 2023.<ref>[https://www.thetelegraphandargus.co.uk/sport/sportlatest/23499075.bradford-bulls-centre-reveals-brave-call-enjoys-starts/ Bradford Bulls centre reveals brave call as he enjoys starts]</ref>

[[Wakefield Trinity]] paid an undisclosed fee to secure the signing of Myers from the [[Bradford Bulls]] in December 2024. He signed a three-year deal with the option of a fourth.<ref>[https://wakefieldtrinity.com/trinity-sign-jayden-myers/ Trinity Sign Jayden Myers]</ref>

Myers made his [[Wakefield Trinity|Trinity]] debut in the [[Super League]] against the [[Salford Red Devils]] in May 2025.<ref>[https://www.wakefieldexpress.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/wakefield-trinity-turn-on-attacking-style-in-13-try-romp-against-salford-5145974 Wakefield Trinity turn on attacking style in 13-try romp against Salford]</ref>

He spent time in 2025 on loan at the [[Batley Bulldogs]] in the [[2025 RFL Championship|Betfred Championship]].<ref>[https://www.dewsburyreporter.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/batley-bulldogs-comeback-falls-just-short-in-defeat-to-hunslet-5090909 Batley Bulldogs’ comeback falls just short in defeat to Hunslet]</ref>

Myers signed a five-year extension to his deal at Wakefield during the 2025 season, keeping at the [[Belle Vue (Wakefield)|DIY Kitchens Stadium]] until the end of the 2030 season.<ref>[https://wakefieldtrinity.com/star-boy-sticking-with-wakey/ Star Boy Sticking With Wakey!]</ref><ref>[https://www.superleague.co.uk/article/5362/myers-commits-future-to-trinity Myers commits future to Trinity]</ref><ref>[https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cvg3yzrp17vo Myers signs five-year Wakefield deal]</ref>
